sellingList.light: 30 minutes of charging  160 minutes of use

reviewsList.name: Kate Reed
reviewsList.comment: Hey guys Kate here. So I bough this for a gift for my boyfriend for us for our house and we love it! it is so cool and definitely worth the money espically when it goes on sale! Good buy for sure. Very bright too!

reviewsList.name: Vic
reviewsList.comment:
Took no time at all to get set up
app download is easy
connecting to wifi simple
looks good

reviewsList.name: TechLover
reviewsList.comment: These lights are awesome, They're nice and bright and look fantastic. I used them behind a screen and they look great. I thought I'd give these a try rather than an LED strip just because they're easy to remove. Although I guess too easy, the adhesive completely gave out after a week. I replaced the adhesive with some 3m tape and all has been good since then. I'm not going to let that affect the rating however. I think this product looks great and easy to setup, the app is also good and so I think it gets the full 10/10 rating.

reviewsList.name: Nolan Stone
reviewsList.comment: Using them on my desk to add some cool color effects for my livestreams and my youtube videos to add a touch of color to the scene and it really looks nice. I mostly just use single color mode but there are a lot of cool effects that move and change colors. It connected right up to my phone, and also has a nice, wired switch to turn them off and on that I stuck to the backside of my monitor. Very cool!

reviewsList.name: Kevin Dombrowski VINE VOICE
reviewsList.comment:
Setup was a snap, and it added some much needed color to my gaming PC setup. The app was easy to use, and it was a cinch to get everything connected to the network and running.

I'm really happy with the added splash of color and I recommend it.

reviewsList.name: Jon Whipple
reviewsList.comment: Ran one vertically and one horizontally inside my PC with the USB cable plugged into an inside USB port, looks great! I set it a static color similar to everything else, I like the end result!

reviewsList.name: Aj
reviewsList.comment: These lights work really nice! The light is bright, the colors are vibrant. It worked with Alexa perfectly.

reviewsList.name: jeff
reviewsList.comment: These lights actually look fantastic. They have a great brightness and diffusion as well as very vibrant RGB colors. I was using a pair of GOVEE lights that are similar but have started to have flickering issues after just a year of use, and to be honest I like the look of these a lot more. I am hopeful that they will last more than a year but even if they don't the cost is far cheaper than the GOVEE lights were making them a great value no matter how long they last. Highly recommend.

reviewsList.name: Arnoldo Gutierrez
reviewsList.comment: Love these lights. Govee quality but at a better price. I mounted them behind my computer and they look fantastic.

reviewsList.name: Bob Johnson
reviewsList.comment:
These light bars are extremely easy to set up.

The lightbars themselves are already put together, all you have to decide is whether you want to use the stand up base or the clip on side mount. The clip on side mount can be used to lay them flat or even mount them to a wall.

They come with a single on/off manual controller that has two cords coming out that go to each light, you can achieve at least a 10 foot separation of the lights or anything in between.

Once plugged in you can set them up in the SmartLife App, which was very fast and easy and then once setup you can control the color of the lights, or use one of the many scenes already setup. You can even create your own scene.

reviewsList.name: kevin
reviewsList.comment: These are very bright & customizable led light bars. I like that they have bases so they can stand on a table or desk plus mounting brackets to attach to a wall. Lots of custom scenes to choose from when using the smartphone app. I really like that the colors can pulse to music playing. I have them next to my computer monitor to use while chilling to music. Also they are great for setting a overall mood in my room.

reviewsList.name: Brian
reviewsList.comment: Love all the lighting effects and variety to brightness, warmth, color and pattern. Seen some of these kinds of RGB light bars that lack oomph and just aren't bright enough to be more than a colored nightlight, but these are pretty good. Good app integration and love the music sync feature. I already had the Smart Life app for another product that uses it, but it works with Google and Alexa as well. They won't illuminate an entire room, but for providing mood lighting and backlighting for your gaming area, they're great!
